query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `gs1_attributes` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `attributeCode` varchar(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `attributeName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `sector` enum('food_hb','diy_garden_pet','healthcare','agriculture') NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `datatype` enum('text','number','boolean','date','code_list') NOT NULL,
  `codeListId` int,
  `isMandatory` boolean DEFAULT FALSE,
  `esrsRelevance` text,
  `dppRelevance` text,
  `packagingRelated` boolean DEFAULT FALSE,
  `sustainabilityRelated` boolean DEFAULT FALSE,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `gs1_attributes_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  INDEX `sector_idx` (`sector`),
  INDEX `packaging_idx` (`packagingRelated`),
  INDEX `sustainability_idx` (`sustainabilityRelated`)
)

  INDEX `sector_idx` (`sector`),
  INDEX `packaging_idx` (`packagingRelated`),
  INDEX `sustainability_idx` (`sustainabilityRelated`)
)
